summary: Memory at 80% is driven by 7 Claude Code instances (~10GB) and Brave browser (~5GB), not system inefficiency. Existing zram/earlyoom infrastructure is working correctly; no system changes needed.

artifacts.summary: Analysis of memory consumers, evaluation of existing optimizations, and recommendations focused on user practices rather than system changes

next_steps: No implementation needed - current system is well-optimized. User can reduce memory by consolidating Claude sessions and managing browser tabs.
